response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and deep technical breadth, including work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years specifically in production-grade AI solutions, cloud-based GenAI systems, or RAG/vector databases — his AI exposure appears incidental rather than focused, and his education is a BS without advanced degree, limiting perceived depth in GenAI theory.
strengths: Extensive experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic workflow tooling
Proven track record in building scalable cloud-native systems (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker)
Strong mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and DevOps practices
concerns: No explicit demonstration of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI or AI system deployment
Missing clear experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in professional context
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Broad Technical Breadth vs. AI Specialization
